name: Path Traversal: '\..\filename'
description: The product does not properly neutralize '\..\' sequences in user-supplied pathnames on Windows systems, where backslash directory separators allow traversal outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '\..\' backslash-prefixed traversal sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node normalizing separators and performing full path canonicalization with directory containment checks
